━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔴 CRITICAL BLOCKERS (Must fix before ANY production use)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. COMPONENT STUBS NOT FUNCTIONAL [3-4 hours]
   └─ Files: EditableValueField.tsx + 4 others
   └─ Impact: Feature is completely unusable
   └─ Fix: Complete component implementations

2. VALUE HISTORY DISABLED [2-3 hours]
   └─ File: src/actions/custom-values.ts (lines 42-100 commented out)
   └─ Impact: No audit trail for financial changes (COMPLIANCE ISSUE)
   └─ Fix: Add valueHistory field to schema, un-comment tracking functions

3. TEST FAILURES (5 bugs + 4 parsing errors) [2-3 hours]
   └─ File: validation.test.ts + component test files
   └─ Impact: Tests not passing, can't validate feature
   └─ Fix: Fix validation logic bugs, resolve JSX parsing errors

4. INCOMPLETE ROI CALCULATIONS [1-2 hours]
   └─ File: src/actions/custom-values.ts (lines 147-148)
   └─ Impact: Wrong ROI shown for multi-card/multi-player users
   └─ Fix: Call calculatePlayerROI() and calculateHouseholdROI()

5. JSX TEST PARSING ERRORS [1-2 hours]
   └─ Files: 4 component test files fail to parse
   └─ Impact: Component tests don't run
   └─ Fix: Review JSX syntax, verify vitest/Vite config

SUBTOTAL: ~13-21 HOURS OF WORK REQUIRED

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🟠 HIGH PRIORITY (Should fix - affects quality)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

6. NO OPTIMISTIC LOCKING [1-2 hours]
   └─ Impact: Concurrent edits might overwrite each other
   └─ Fix: Add version field check to WHERE clause

7. NO NETWORK TIMEOUT [1-2 hours]
   └─ Impact: Users see no feedback if server is slow
   └─ Fix: Implement 5-second timeout with AbortController

8. VALIDATION LOGIC BUGS [1-2 hours]
   └─ parseCurrencyInput: Doesn't reject "25.05.00" format
   └─ parseCurrencyInput: Doesn't validate max value properly
   └─ isSignificantlyDifferent: Uses > instead of >= for 10% threshold
   └─ isUnusuallyHigh: Always returns true when sticker is $0
   └─ validateBenefitId: Requires 16+ chars (too strict)
   └─ Fix: See CUSTOM_VALUES_QA_REMEDIATION.md for code changes

SUBTOTAL: ~4-6 HOURS

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

5. Add valueHistory schema field (30 min):
   npx prisma migrate dev --name add_value_history_to_user_benefit

6. Implement EditableValueField component (3-4 hours):
   - Core UI component for editing benefit values
